mapper.select: SELECT member_emoticon_seq AS memberEmoticonSeq, member_seq AS memberSeq, image_url AS imageUrl, sort_order AS sortOrder, DATE_FORMAT(create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt FROM member_emoticon WHERE member_seq = #{memberSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, member_emoticon_seq ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM member_emoticon WHERE member_seq = #{memberSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_emoticon (member_seq, image_url, sort_order, use_yn, create_dt) VALUES (#{memberSeq}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder}, 'Y', NOW())
